ddls:
CREATE TABLE "billionaires" (
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billionaire */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the billionaire in the wealth list */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the billionaire */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Net worth of the billionaire in billions */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the billionaire */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of origin */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of wealth (e.g., company, industry) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Exact birth date of the billionaire */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the billionaire */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the billionaire */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the billionaire */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the billionaire has */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the billionaire's record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the billionaire is still active in the business world */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billionaire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaires_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry */,
  "market_size" REAL /* Market size of the industry in billions */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company in billions */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company in billions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billionaire_industry" (
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billionaire */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "primary_industry" INTEGER /* Indicates if the industry is the primary source of the billionaire's wealth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billionaire_id", "industry_id")
)
column_names: Rank of the billionaire in the wealth list
Net worth of the billionaire in billions
Reference to the country of origin
Exact birth date of the billionaire
Number of children the billionaire has
Timestamp of the last update to the billionaire's record
Indicates if the billionaire is still active in the business world
Region or continent the country belongs to
Gross Domestic Product of the country
Market size of the industry in billions
Annual growth rate of the industry
Reference to the industry the company belongs to
Annual revenue of the company in billions
Market capitalization of the company in billions
Indicates if the industry is the primary source of the billionaire's wealth
